picks.quote: When Virna gets out of this first round because she doesn't submit Yan she's going to get absolutely smoked.
Dan Ige has got the power to hurt anybody. We've seen Sean Woodson get chin before by Luis Saldana.
The lock of the week this week is going to be Diego Lopes versus Volkanovski... Diego Lopez is going to come in, finish Volkanovski in the second round
